quote_en: The graphic designer superimposed the logo onto the photo.
quote_zh: 平面设计师将标志叠加在照片上。
ex_en: Do not superimpose your expectations onto others; let them be themselves.
ex_zh: 不要把你的期望叠加在别人身上；让他们做自己。

quote_en: The chef prepared a superlative meal that won awards.
quote_zh: 厨师准备了一顿赢得奖项的卓越餐食。
ex_en: Superlative praise can inflate; a simple "well done" often means more.
ex_zh: 最高的赞美可能让人膨胀；一句简单的“做得好”常常意味着更多。

quote_en: The movie was about supernatural beings like ghosts and witches.
quote_zh: 这部电影是关于像鬼魂和女巫这样的超自然生物。
ex_en: Kindness may seem supernatural in a cruel world, but it is the most natural thing a human can do.
ex_zh: 在一个残酷的世界里，善意可能看起来超自然，但它是一个人能做的最自然的事情。

quote_en: The butterfly's wings had perfect symmetry.
quote_zh: 蝴蝶的翅膀有完美的对称。
ex_en: Symmetry in nature is beautiful; symmetry in a relationship — giving and taking equally — is essential.
ex_zh: 自然界中的对称是美丽的；关系中的对称——平等地给予和索取——是必不可少的。

def_en: A sign of an illness or problem
quote_en: A fever is a symptom of many infections.
quote_zh: 发烧是许多感染的症状。
ex_en: A bad temper is often a symptom, not the disease; find the real cause.
ex_zh: 坏脾气常常是一个症状，而不是疾病；找到真正的原因。

quote_en: In many cultures, hospitality is synonymous with generosity.
quote_zh: 在许多文化中，好客与慷慨是同义的。
ex_en: Your name should not become synonymous with dishonesty; build a reputation that means something good.
ex_zh: 你的名字不应成为不诚实的同义词；建立一个意味着好的声誉。

def_en: A planned method to achieve a goal
quote_en: The coach's tactic of playing defense won the game.
quote_zh: 教练打防守的战术赢得了比赛。
ex_en: A good tactic wins a battle; a good strategy wins the war. Know the difference.
ex_zh: 一个好的战术赢得一场战斗；一个好的战略赢得战争。知道区别。

def_en: To torment by showing something desirable but out of reach
quote_en: The smell of fresh bread tantalized the hungry children.
quote_zh: 新鲜面包的香味逗弄着饥饿的孩子们。
ex_en: Do not tantalize others with promises you cannot keep; honesty is kinder than hope that dies.
ex_zh: 不要用你无法兑现的承诺逗弄他人；诚实比死亡的希望更仁慈。

quote_en: The bridge was a temporary solution until the permanent one was built.
quote_zh: 这座桥是一个临时解决方案，直到永久桥梁建成。
ex_en: Most problems are temporary; only death is permanent. Act accordingly.
ex_zh: 大多数问题是暂时的；只有死亡是永久的。据此行动。

quote_en: He has a tendency to interrupt when others are speaking.
quote_zh: 他有一种打断别人说话的倾向。
ex_en: A tendency toward kindness can be cultivated like a garden; water it daily.
ex_zh: 向善的倾向可以像花园一样培养；每天浇灌它。

quote_en: The school does not tolerate bullying of any kind.
quote_zh: 学校不容忍任何形式的欺凌。
ex_en: To tolerate a wrong is sometimes wisdom, but to tolerate injustice is never courage.
ex_zh: 容忍一个错误有时是智慧，但容忍不公绝不是勇气。

quote_en: The beauty of a rainbow is transitory.
quote_zh: 彩虹的美是短暂的。
ex_en: Most worries are transitory; wait an hour before you act on them.
ex_zh: 大多数担忧是短暂的；在采取行动之前等一个小时。

def_en: A set of three related works
quote_en: The Lord of the Rings is a famous fantasy trilogy.
quote_zh: 《指环王》是著名的奇幻三部曲。
ex_en: Your life is a trilogy: past, present, future. Do not let one volume ruin the others.
ex_zh: 你的人生是一部三部曲：过去、现在、未来。不要让其中一卷毁了其他卷。

quote_en: The photographer set up the camera on a tripod.
quote_zh: 摄影师将相机放在三脚架上。
ex_en: A tripod of values — honesty, kindness, courage — can support any life.
ex_zh: 价值观的三脚架——诚实、善良、勇气——可以支撑任何人生。

def_en: A group of three powerful people
quote_en: The country was ruled by a triumvirate of generals.
quote_zh: 该国由三位将军组成的三人统治集团统治。
ex_en: The triumvirate of wisdom, patience, and action can solve almost any problem.
ex_zh: 智慧、耐心和行动的三位一体几乎可以解决任何问题。

quote_en: The unification of the two kingdoms took decades.
quote_zh: 两个王国的统一花了数十年。
ex_en: The unification of your words and your actions is the definition of integrity.
ex_zh: 你的言语和行动的统一是正直的定义。

quote_en: The president made a unilateral decision without consulting Congress.
quote_zh: 总统未经与国会协商就做出了单方面决定。
ex_en: A unilateral apology is harder than a mutual one, but it is also braver.
ex_zh: 单方面的道歉比相互的道歉更难，但它也更勇敢。

def_en: Being the only one of its kind
quote_en: Each snowflake is unique in shape and pattern.
quote_zh: 每片雪花在形状和图案上都是独特的。
ex_en: You are unique, not because you are better, but because no one else can live your life.
ex_zh: 你是独特的，不是因为你更好，而是因为没有其他人可以过你的人生。

quote_en: The desire for happiness is universal.
quote_zh: 对幸福的渴望是普遍的。
ex_en: A universal truth is not always popular; speak it anyway.
ex_zh: 一个普遍的真理并不总是受欢迎的；不管怎样都要说出来。

quote_en: The soldier's position was untenable, so he retreated.
quote_zh: 士兵的阵地无法防守，所以他撤退了。
ex_en: An untenable argument is a house built on sand; let it go before it collapses on you.
ex_zh: 一个站不住脚的论点是一座建在沙上的房子；在它坍塌在你身上之前放手。

quote_en: The plan for a perfect city was utopian and never built.
quote_zh: 建造完美城市的计划是乌托邦式的，从未实现。
ex_en: A utopian dream is not worthless; it gives direction, even if the destination is unreachable.
ex_zh: 一个乌托邦式的梦想不是毫无价值的；它指引方向，即使目的地无法到达。

quote_en: The sunset turned the sky a brilliant vermilion.
quote_zh: 日落将天空染成了灿烂的朱红色。
ex_en: A vermilion blush of sunrise promises a new day; receive it with hope.
ex_zh: 日出的一抹朱红预示新的一天；带着希望迎接它。

def_en: Having a strong desire for revenge
quote_en: The vindictive neighbor spread rumors after the argument.
quote_zh: 那个报复性的邻居在争吵后散布谣言。
ex_en: A vindictive heart is a prison; forgiveness is the key.
ex_zh: 一颗报复的心是一座监狱；宽恕是钥匙。
